title: Community comments: transparent, technology-neutral, future-ready
author: Harshith Viswanath, Yavisth Makkar, Uddhav Gupta & Mohit Mokal
summary: ILTN convened the legal and legaltech community before submitting formal comments to the AI Committee.
body:
## The process and the asks

- Hosted an AMA session with Mohit Mokal (Founder, Mohit Mokal Mediation), bringing the legal and legaltech community together before submitting formal comments
- The submission draws on community discussions and independent research
- Recommendations focus on making the framework **transparent, technology-neutral, and future-ready**, centred on judicial independence, accountability, and public trust
